summary.shape_sentence: Bearish open-drive and liquidation into late morning, followed by a long basing process and a strong but incomplete late-day recovery.

goat.note: Opening liquidation from the upper 25900s into the 25700s was the standout move of the session.

red_circles.behavior: Best bearish pivot behavior appeared at the failed opening spike, the 10:25 lower high, and the 11:30 rebound failure.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivot behavior developed after the 12:00 to 13:35 low zone, especially as price built higher lows into the post-14:00 recovery.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply around 25850 to 25910 was respected for most of the session; late buyers pressed into it but did not fully reclaim the open.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 25640 to 25700 was tested, briefly flushed, then defended into the afternoon reversal.

time_markers.10am_blue: Active liquidation near 25740 after a failed opening high.
time_markers.12pm_red: Weak lunch trade fading back toward the low zone near 25650.
time_markers.2pm_green: Recovery base forming above the LOD near 25720.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Strong close near 25852, close to the late recovery high but still below the open.

takeaway: Bearish liquidation day with a major opening drive lower, midday basing near demand, and a late recovery that reclaimed much of the range but failed to erase the bearish open-to-close result.
